allow: PowerShell(php artisan vendor:publish --provider="PHPOpenSourceSaver\\JWTAuth\\Providers\\LaravelServiceProvider" --no-interaction 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; Write-Output "=== jwt secret ==="; php artisan jwt:secret --force --no-interaction 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; Write-Output "=== DB test ==="; php artisan db:show 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell(php artisan install:broadcasting --no-interaction --without-node 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20; Write-Output "=== files ==="; Test-Path config\\broadcasting.php; Test-Path routes\\channels.php)

PowerShell(php artisan vendor:publish --provider="Laravel\\Reverb\\ReverbServiceProvider" --no-interaction 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; Write-Output "=== reverb cfg ==="; Test-Path config\\reverb.php)

PowerShell(php artisan tinker --execute="try { DB::statement\('create table zz_probe \(id bigint generated always as identity primary key, name varchar\(255\) not null, dob date null\)'\); echo 'CREATE OK'; DB::statement\('create index zz_probe_name_idx on zz_probe \(name\)'\); echo ' INDEX OK'; DB::statement\('drop table zz_probe'\); echo ' DROPPED'; } catch \(\\Throwable \\$e\) { echo 'ERR: '.\\$e->getMessage\(\); }" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12)
